title: The Dark Fantasy
description:
Dark Fantasy Minecraft Modpack.
Experience the dark fantasy in this medieval themed pack, with 180+ immersive mods, shaders/texture packs, and custom main menu and music. 
What are you waiting for?, hit that play button!
body:
## **Welcome to TheDarkFantasy, a modpack based on, you guessed it, dark fantasy.**
![Welcome!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7575b538fad94d6139d7781c4eb41e78d327eaee.png)
The main purpose is to make an immersive experience based of medieval and fantasy things, and this modpack nails both aspects.


![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/340e525466df687fbb7b37597a5bdd6b25b54e81.png)

Embark on an epic odyssey into a realm where the ancient echoes of medieval prowess meet the mystical allure of fantasy. Traverse haunting forests draped in perpetual twilight, where whispers of forgotten civilizations lure you into their enigmatic depths. Explore crumbling ruins and shadowed dungeons, where each corner teems with malevolent creatures hungry for challenge.
![fanart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39c0aac32d0bb355a9e8408e915c68cb45e32351.png)


In this heavyweight modpack, meticulously crafted for the discerning adventurer, every element has been painstakingly designed to enrich your journey. From the intricate detail of custom blocks that seamlessly blend into the world's fabric to a personalized main menu and cursor that immerse you deeper into the narrative, each feature invites you to wield creativity and strategy like never before.



At the heart of your adventure lies a tapestry of innovations: wield legendary weapons honed in the forges of ancient lore, each imbued with its own mythical power. Engage in combat that transcends mere button presses, where fluid movement mechanics empower your every maneuver. Dodge through perilous landscapes, summoning spells that defy the very laws of nature to emerge victorious against formidable new bosses.



Step into multiplayer realms,enhanced by essential mod, that allows you to play multiplayer without paying for a server. 
Strategize with allies using proximity voice chat, synchronizing your efforts amidst the haunting melodies that underscore your exploits. Customize your experience with meticulously curated texture packs and shaders that elevate visual fidelity to stunning heights, transforming the mundane into the extraordinary.



Delve into expansive dungeons that stretch the limits of your courage and intellect, their intricate structures hiding secrets and treasures that promise both peril and reward. Traverse over 120 biomes, each a testament to the modpack's commitment to diversity, where every step reveals a new marvel waiting to be uncovered.



With a commitment to excellence and an unwavering dedication to crafting an unforgettable experience, this modpack beckons you to carve your legend in a world where darkness and beauty dance in perfect harmony. Are you ready to embrace the challenge and forge your legacy in this dark fantasy saga?


This modpack adds a bunch of things, here is a list with some images, only see them if you want to spoil yourself a little, because this is a little 2% taste of the actual content in the modpack. :

**Shaders**
   
![issues](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ae579e6a74307b3410c34300fde79b46bc89186.png)
It's a combination of all the necessary things to create the best experience.
As expected, the first version might have some bugs, so feel free to share them in the discord server, so they can be fixed in the next versions.

You can also suggest new mods or mechanics, and they might end up in the next version!
You make your own story, so find your purpose in the dark fantasy...

**NOTES:**

Distant horizons is DISABLED by default, it's you're choice if you want to enable it, the reason of it being disabled is the incompatibility with the Bliss Shader, if you don't want to use the bliss shader, then ENABLE distant horizons!


**Allocating 6-8 GB of ram is enough for this modpack to run, allocating more memory could cause issues.**

If you want to achieve a more accurate look to the dark fantasy style, you can configure **complementary shaders** or **bliss shader**, the fog and lighting are key aspects for the dark fantasy look, so play with them and get your best combination!

**THIS IS A HEAVY AND DEMANDING MODPACK**

**MAIN MENU SONG:**

**ORIGINAL=** dorian concept - hide (yamaha CS01)


**USED**= dorian concept - hide (yamaha CS01), but it's full version, slowed and still more atmospheric

[dorian concept - hide (yamaha CS01)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1nClVTqTc80)
